message:
feat(polyfills): Add native encoding module (TextEncoder, TextDecoder, atob, btoa, hex)

Moves all encoding/decoding operations from JavaScript into native Zig code
running in the WASM sandbox. This eliminates unnecessary host function calls
and reduces sandbox boundary crossings.

Implemented functions:
- TextEncoder/TextDecoder (UTF-8 encoding/decoding)
- atob/btoa (base64 encoding/decoding using std.base64)
- hexEncode/hexDecode (hex string conversion)

All operations use stack buffers (64KB) for zero-allocation performance.
Integrated into both normal and wizer execution paths in wasm_main_static.zig.
